description: Disbanded 1970. RIAA certifications are 183M units total including album, single, and digital certifications. All members deceased except Paul and Ringo who tour solo.
recommendedAction: Use legacy certification data. No new certifications under The Beatles name expected.

description: Brat album certified Gold (2024). No prior RIAA album certifications. Boom Clap single 3x Platinum. Most certifications are from features on other artists' tracks (Iggy Azalea's Fancy, Icona Pop's I Love It).
recommendedAction: Include all RIAA certifications regardless of lead vs featured.

description: RIAA certifications listed are for Eurythmics (duo), not Dave Stewart solo. Solo work has minimal certifications. Combined certifications reflect Eurythmics output.
recommendedAction: Note that certifications reflect Eurythmics work. Solo Dave Stewart certifications are minimal.

description: Fred Again.. primarily releases via EPs and streaming. Traditional album sales figures are not applicable. USB series released as streaming-first projects.
recommendedAction: Focus on streaming metrics rather than album sales. USB EP sales minimal.

description: 53M RIAA units includes extensive featured artist credits. Life Is Good Diamond certification as lead artist. Most prolific featured artist in hip-hop history.
recommendedAction: Include all RIAA-certified units regardless of lead vs featured role.

description: 20th-century classical composer. No RIAA certifications. His works are performed by classical ensembles but not tracked by commercial certification bodies.
recommendedAction: Keep totalCertifications as 0. No commercial certification data exists for classical composers.

description: No RIAA certifications found. Gold certification in UK for The Man-Machine. Enormous influence but limited US commercial certification record.
recommendedAction: Note that international certifications exist but no US (RIAA) certifications.

description: Retired from live performance 2023. Tubular Bells Gold certified in 1974. Limited RIAA record despite 17.5M album sales worldwide.
recommendedAction: Use available historical data. Tubular Bells is primary RIAA certification.

description: RIAA Gold certification for xx album is as part of The xx band, not solo work. Solo album Mid Air has no RIAA certifications.
recommendedAction: Note that certifications reflect The xx band work, not solo output.

description: Minimalist composer (b. 1936). No RIAA certifications. His works are performed by classical ensembles. 90th birthday celebration Oct 2026.
recommendedAction: Keep totalCertifications as 0. No commercial certification data.

description: 120.5M RIAA units as of 2025-2026. Kill Bill and Snooze Diamond-certified. Numbers are rapidly increasing due to continued streaming success.
recommendedAction: Data valid as of research date (2026-05-12). Monitor for updates.

description: Disbanded 1991. Certifications reflect legacy catalog only. No new certifications expected. David Byrne tours solo with their songs.
